name: Lemon Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, beat together flour, butter, and 1/2 cup confectioners sugar with an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
4. In another small bowl, beat eggs, sugar, baking powder, salt, and lemon juice until smooth. Pour over the hot crust.
5. Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until bubbly and lightly browned.
6. Allow the bars to cool completely on a wire rack. Dust lightly with remaining confectioners sugar. Cut into diamonds, about 2-1/2" x 1-1/2".
7. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
